query:
SELECT pjl.sceneId, pjl.pjlStatus, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM providerJobLogs pjl
WHERE pjl.sceneId IN (
  SELECT id FROM musicVideoScenes 
  WHERE jobId = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM musicVideoJobs WHERE status = 'failed')
  AND pjlStatus = 'failed'
  LIMIT 10
)
GROUP BY pjl.sceneId, pjl.pjlStatus
ORDER BY pjl.sceneId, pjl.pjlStatus;
